title: pilocereus gounellei var. zehntneri
intro: Pilocereus gounellei var. zehntneri, also known as the Prickly Pear or Dragon Fruit, is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pilocereus gounellei var. zehntneri include its ability to help manage high blood sugar levels, reduce the risk of certain types of cancer, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, juices, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
